page_content:
Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 8 credits.

HESP729 Advanced Clinical Practice in Audiology (1-8 Credits) Clinical internship in selected off-campus facilities. Prerequisite: HESP649.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 8 credits.

HESP730 Vestibular-ocular Assessment and Management (Electrophysiologic Measures II) (3 Credits)

Advanced principles and methods of evaluating vestibular-ocular function using electrophysiologic measures. Includes rehabilitative issues pertaining to balance disorders and advanced electrophysiologic measures of auditory system function.
